reviews.comment:
instalaciones cuidadas. buena atencion. parque arbolado con mesas para descansar.recomendable y cerca de la autopista.

(Translated by Google)
Well-maintained facilities. Good service. Wooded park with tables for relaxing. Highly recommended and close to the highway.

reviews.comment:
excelente lugar para desviar cuando vamos por la AU9, reponer pilas, distender piernas, baños limpios. todo acorde a lo esperado de un ACA. espcacio para acampar con mesas y sombra.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop when traveling on the AU9, recharge your batteries, stretch your legs, clean restrooms. Everything as expected from an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). Camping area with tables and shade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMVBiZVVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños muy sucios, no hay papel higiénico. El predio invita a quedarse y relajarse.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are very dirty, there's no toilet paper. The property is inviting, though, and you'd like to stay and relax.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBME5uVm9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de la gente de playa, excelentes los sándwiches pan francés con fiambres muy frescos, los recomiendo, una contra: cierran el restaurante a las 21:00 hs sin excepción... a veces no llego y... 😣

(Translated by Google)
The staff at Playa were very friendly, and the French bread sandwiches with very fresh cold cuts were excellent. I highly recommend them. One downside: the restaurant closes at 9:00 PM without exception... sometimes I don't make it and... 😣
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReTRfbjRBRRAB
